en: The teacher is here.

ab: ta cisal loyi la, helax mtama kya cntman su.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.

ab: swali cu, mcuqi cu tehuq la!
en: Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.

ab: pisa hngawan na ryax mwani coni?
en: What day is it today?

ab: hngawan ryax mwani ga te magal ryax, mhngaw cyuxan, glux ta musa mcisal haw!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!
Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: cyuxan ga te tyugan ryax na hngawan, qlyan cyuxan ga usa ta mcisal boru ki?
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧?
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!
What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: cyuxan ga hngawan na ryax, kingan ro yaya ga musa cami Kyokay.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?
I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: sesiy, mxal ktu mu, usa cu stnxan.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.

ab: huyay cu musa mima qba ga?
en: May I go wash my hands?

ab: ya kinga masuq mqwas la, nna cikah ro usa.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: sesiy, mxal ciyal tunux mu, qlyan ga msina cu hngawan.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: uya, pnbaq lungan mbinah su muyax.
en: Okay, take care and go home.

ab: Sesiy, sina cu hngaw te qutux ryax qa hngawan, musa cu pktayux Ising.
ch: A:老師，我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is Ciwas?

ab: mxal ktu nya, cyan maki kya stnxan.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is Losing?

ab: Sesiy, mxal qolu ro qelis qba na Losing, wan mhnaw mwani coni.
ch: B:老師，Losing喉嚨痛和手受傷，今天請假。
en: Teacher, Losing has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.
Why didn’t Sayun come?
She has a fever.
